subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf, O My Branch, O My Handmaiden, O thou who standest before My Throne! We beseech God, blessed and exalted be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یا افنانی یا امتی یا ایتها الحاضره امام عرشی نسئل الله تبارک و تعالی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
